item.title: Australia passes its IQ test
item.description: Australia votes in the moderate liberal party, Labor, rejecting the right wing Liberal party in convincing fashion (confusing names, I know). Best of all, their Trump wannabe, Peter Dutton (aka Voldermort) lost his seat. Well done Aus!!

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
om. just because i can...
why not both?
wonder who i stole this from...
k bai!
yup.
yup.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: What the hell is a "man" anyway?
item.description: Ranges are usually from 300 (considered low) to 1000 and above. Doctor told me she has never seen someone that was under 150 before. We talked about depression, extreme lethargy, and what being a man might mean to me. We even had a frank discussion about the risks of doing some "gender affirming" options that might help me. I like being a man. So, maybe treatment will help me feel more... complete? Now I'm left with figuring out what I'm going to do about it. And unfortunately that includes me always feeling like I wasn't "a real man" my whole life. Not really sure what that might even mean. It's strange. This isn't a new problem. But looking at that 99 staring back at me made me feel even less than I did before. I guess ignorance can be bliss. I talked to my wife about it and being the superhuman she is, she said she supports me in whatever I decide. She did ask one important question, "Will you still cry with me when we watch movies? I like it when you do that. It makes me feel like I'm married to someone who understands their emotions and that's important to me. I don't want to lose that with you." I truly don't deserve her. I explained that I don't think that would suddenly go away if I did treatment of some kind. I think that's just the kind of emotional weirdo I am. Not sure that anyone would give a crap about this, but just in case there are others out there who may have similar struggles, you're definitely not alone. Us emotional weirdos are everywhere. We just don't talk about it. Which, let's face it, is part of the problem. So, we think we're all alone, and brother that just isn't true.
item.dc:creator: thebonesofmyancestors

item.title: Australia VOTES LEFT
item.description: Standing shoulder to shoulder with Canada and the UK, it might just be the biggest Labor Party win in history. I cannot tell you how relieved I am. https://www.abc.net.au/news/2025-05-03/federal-election-2025-live-anthony-albanese-peter-dutton/105245936

item.title: Rejoice, Australia.
item.description: Like Canada, we have kept out a conservative government, and the Discount Trump has lost his seat in parliament. (To clarify, the Labor Party is our Centre party, the Coalition is a team up of the Liberal Party, our Conservative party, and the Nationals, a regional-focused Conservative party) I breathe a sigh of relief, I raise my glass, we all look to the future.
item.dc:creator: CommanderXirlos

owo

Balatro is healing me

Defo the right pic right now.
I hate this fucking country
I'm curious how transgender people can live behind closed door in any practical way. What I think he means is "I want transgender people under practical house arrest." In which case: Choke.
When I sleep, I hear the music. I'm gonna start dreaming about the game. Help.

item.title: What Happened Today #92
item.description: This is how authoritarians punish. This is also how authoritarian regimes fund their activities. Trump’s team is gutting health, housing, education, and science. Not to save money, but because courts will not let them completely erase these programs established by the co-equal legislative branch. And you can be certain that the Trump administration is quite clear on who gets punished and who gets protected. Immigrants are stripped of visas for minor infractions. Capitol rioters get payouts. State workers are threatened with arrest for following the governor's guidance. A gang suspect is deported before trial to avoid due process. Loyalty, not law, is the standard. Even U.S. propaganda is under siege. Radio Free Europe lost its funding. R.E.M. reissued their 1981 debut of the same title in protest, reminding the world why the service mattered in the first place. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Links for What Happened Today - #92 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-scotus-socialsecurity 2. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-threatened-again 3. https://go.govbrief.today/head-start-reprieve 4. https://go.govbrief.today/intelligence-agency-cuts 5. https://go.govbrief.today/cia-top-doctor 6. https://go.govbrief.today/rfk-measles-conspiracy 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-chronic-disease 8. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-reorg-rd 9. https://go.govbrief.today/housing-assistance-cut 10. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-hud-reorg 11. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-70k-ftes 12. https://www.courthousenews.com/federal-judge-blocks-trumps-throttling-of-perkins-coie/ 13. https://go.govbrief.today/temu-us-sales 14. https://go.govbrief.today/gas-buddy-truth 15. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/05/02/trump-ashli-babbitt-january-6-settlement/83414359007/ 16. https://go.govbrief.today/ms13-santos-released 17. https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-catch-revoke 18. https://go.govbrief.today/homan-arrest-evers 19. https://go.govbrief.today/maine-wins-freeze 20. https://www.newsweek.com/trump-posting-apparent-ai-photo-himself-pope-takes-off-online-2067617 21. https://go.govbrief.today/rem-benefit-radiofreeeurope

item.title: Backlogged memes: Aragorn at McDonalds
item.description:
Hobbit life could be our life if we’d just overthrow the rich
Pretty generous to call any level of processing power that I do “executive level”
The older I get the worse this problem gets. Used to be a 5 year age gap now a man is 20-30 years older than me and I’m like HELlo
If you like petty drama that doesn’t involve you I have a story (you can skip it or whatever) I was American, moved to Germany, right? Currently pregnant. When I was around 20 weeks a mom in my mom group (also American) offered to invite me over for tea and have a look at her baby things that she was giving away. But she literally would not let me schedule the meetup until I had the 20 week ultrasound and confirmed I was having a girl because the clothes were girl clothes. What. I decided to go just to see, she waits until I’m EN ROUTE to tell me 1) she lives up on the 3rd floor, no elevator (im asthmatic) and 2) she will be charging for the clothes. Now I have been forbidden by my mom to buy ANY clothes, free is acceptable but she plans on bringing me a lot,but I am hoping maybe she has like a bouncer or some toys? So I haul my ass there anyway and get served a glass of tap water (the fuck happened to tea) And then her fucking Great Dane burst out of nowhere and jumped onto my lap so that was fun “oh he’s friendly” ma’am he is on my lap and I didn’t know he existed until just this second And she starts pulling out clothes and I try nicely to say that I don’t actually NEED clothes (especially if they’re going to cost anything) and am more looking for like toys, she pulls out a couple of toys but then her baby starts playing with them so she says oh no those aren’t for sale clearly whatsername still likes them. There is nothing else. I ask how much she’s charging and she wants €1 per clothing item, I only have a 10 so I pick out 10 things and scoot because idk what else to do This lady is so rich, is the weird part. Her place was 3x bigger than mine but she was somehow paying the same amount in rent, but they have dual incomes and they have been here longer than us, her kids toy vacuum is nicer than my actual one. So I was going to just judge her for nickel and diming someone much worse off with clothes she was going to sell for the same amount on eBay or whatever. But then! THEN!!! I ran into another mom and told her I did get one cute outfit from the exchange and the mom describes it perfectly and says “yeah I gave her that, it was my daughters” WHAT. So to summarize, rich lady was GIVEN CLOTHING and then immediately turned around and sold it for Pennies as like a power play??? I genuinely could not figure out why. wtf.
This weekend in a nutshell
Re: a story about two rival professors who were married. Very mr and mrs smith coded
A stranger nicely corrected my son and he walked off the playground and sulked in some daisies and asked to go home. The rsd is strong in this one.
Proof that he doesn’t know what he’s doing because I could not solve a rubriks cube. You know what else I can’t do? Eye contact and basic conversation. Git gud, brain worm
That woman is living the dream, I should think
This is my Headcanon for hunger games actually
Miss piggy is the best.
That’s what you need to see as a kid honestly
@alexfalcone is hilarious and probably not on this app
It seems to be working but like what would the rat do, really? Make things better?
Accidentally deep quote from a surgeon mid surgery
Deep thoughts from Aragorn son of Arathorn
Sometimes I imagine what an ideal world would look like and work through if we have the technology for it. And then I get really depressed and want a drink.
I should probably just give up on my video game dream
I set up a sim to be exactly like me and sent her to college and she found an npc exactly like my husband and had my exact relationship and marriage complete with drama and had a son and afaik my life followed her exact trajectory and to this day I am still freaked tf out She was a fairy and so was the husband and I didn’t learn until later the historical link between autism ans the fae I think Apollo hit my sims game with a dodgeball
Romance isn’t dead
This is how my husband and I say I love you. I make sure he always has his favorite food (he barely eats anything else). He makes sure I eat because I have some Arfid/eating disorder issues.
It’s true. Sometimes you have to learn how to see it but once someone reveals their love language they’ll keep showing you
I need this calendar in my life
It’s called the dalai llama
This was such a weird take I just ignored it when it crossed my dash but it turned into A Thing Another one that turned into A Thing, if you like niche drama: an author posted this week claiming her identity was stolen. She thinks chatGPT scraped all her data and made a digital version of her that then used information about her personal life to self publish a book about it on Amazon under her author name. Turns out it was a real book by a real person who just happened to have the same name as her. It was kind of funny until my husband said “yeah schizophrenia will fuck up your shit” and I realized that’s probably exactly what happened
Anyway that’s my time later taters
